rules.rule_text:
rule Lumma
{
	meta:
		author = "MalBeacon"
		description = "Lumma system information file"
		reference = "https://github.com/MalBeacon/what-is-this-stealer"

	strings:
		$x1 = "- LummaC2 Build:" ascii
		$x2 = "- LID:" ascii
		$x3 = "- Configuration: " ascii
		$x4 = "- Display resolution:" ascii
		$x5 = "- HWID:" ascii
		$x6 = "- OS Version:" ascii

	condition:
		all of them
}
